race.description: Wests Entertainment Group Super Mdn Hcp
race.comment: LOVE YOU ANYWAY (11) is holding her form on the provincial tracks and looks to find the right race at start twenty. Gripped on late from the outside gate with a respectable second over 1100m at Gosford in a decent rating contest. Maps to stalk the speed and can tick the 1200m box today. OAKFIELD MARS (4) jumped in grade in a four-horse field with a battling third over 1300m at Newcastle in a Super Maiden. Capable on her day and adept in all conditions. LONG TIME LOVERS (10) closed strongly from midfield with a respectable fourth over 1200m at Warren. Near her top for this and expected to be around the money. ZOUSANITY (6) back without a trial after bumping into some talented types last prep. Sticky gate and don't dismiss.
